name: Escudella De Pages (Country Stew)
recipeInstructions:
(NOTE: Oz measurements are by weight.)
1. Make a good broth with the water, veal and ham bones, simmering slowly.
2. When nearly done, add salt to taste and the saffron.
3. Blanch the salt pork to remove excess salt, then dice it.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet, adding the diced salt pork and chopped onions.
5. When the onions begin to brown, add the pieces of chicken and veal; cook slowly.
6. Peel the potatoes, leek, and carrots, chopping them finely, then add to the skillet with the chicken and veal.
7. Chop the cabbage finely and add it to the skillet.
8. Stir everything well.
9. Remove the bones from the broth and discard.
10. Empty the contents of the skillet into the broth.
11. Add the beans, rice, and pasta.
12. Cook for about 10 - 15 minutes until the rice and pasta are done; serve very hot.
